title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'on life support' after rejecting Tehran's counterproposal
summary_full: The testy U.S.-Iran ceasefire began in mid-April after Trump threatened to destroy Iran's "whole civilization" if no deal was struck.
summary_public: The testy U.S.-Iran ceasefire began in mid-April after Trump threatened to destroy Iran's "whole civilization" if no deal was struck.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump says Iran ceasefire is 'on life support'
